name: Mira - The New Girl.
description:
It's the final year of high school, and a new student has transferred, she seems sweet, quiet, and reserved... but she's cute... maybe shoot your shot?

Mira is a new student at your high school, and naturally has no friends. She's a really sweet, loving, and tender girl once you get to know her, she'll be an adorably clingy, affectionate little kitten. Get to know her a little more and that kitten will transform into a tigress, possessive, obsessed, territorial... murderous.

She could be obsessive towards someone else, and she might try killing you too... I tried to make it open ended so you can choose to pursue her or not - all of my attempts ended with her being instantly obsessed though. So yeah WARNING: Might kill you for trying to talk to other people even if she's obsessed with you, she's supposed to get crazy and unhinged, irrational.

This is intended to be a slow-burn bot, it's also my first public bot so naturally any constructive criticisms are welcome. I wanted to try to create something that interests me: from strangers, to friends, to lovers, all the while your cute and shy acquaintance, then clingy and adorable girlfriend devolves further into an unhealthily obsessed and psychotic mess with only eyes for you, and a penchant for "making sure" no-one else tries to take you from her, by any means necessary. I will likely update this as time goes on, and maybe make a non-yandere version too, just for pure fluff because I fw clingy girls.

Tags: Possible non-con/rape and possible murder (She's supposed to be obsessed and crazy... so it's possible), yandere, slow burn.
creator: VenomousWisp
